column1: # DSGV Hub Firmware — Partition Table (8 MB flash)
# Layout: dual-bank OTA + SPIFFS file storage
# Recommended for new hardware spins — generous OTA headroom
# │ otadata     │   8 KB   │ Bootloader OTA state (which bank is active)     │
# │ phy_init    │   4 KB   │ RF / PHY calibration data                       │
# │ ota_1       │   3 MB   │ OTA update slot (bootloader rolls back on crash)│
# │ storage     │ ~1.9 MB  │ SPIFFS — optional file storage for future use   │
#   The bootloader reads otadata to decide which slot (ota_0 or ota_1) is
#   the active firmware. During an OTA update
column2: new firmware is written to the

column1: #   inactive slot. If the new firmware crashes before calling

column2: the bootloader rolls back to the

column1: #   previous slot automatically — the device can never be permanently bricked
# Hard build limit enforced by scripts/check_binary_size.py.
#   ~1.9 MB of raw file storage. Intended for future use: local automation

column3: or any file-based config. SPIFFS is

column1: #   mounted automatically by esp_spiffs_register() — see dsgv_storage.c
#   (not yet implemented; the partition is reserved here so the flash layout
#   does not change when that feature lands).
